title: calicorema capitata
intro: Calicorema capitata, also known as the alpine whitetop, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Calicorema capitata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
